purpose: Declares two narrow string-escape helpers used when stitching dynamic strings into the rendered HTML preview document and into the JavaScript bridge calls that update it.
invariants: EscapeHtml escapes & < > " '. EscapeScriptString additionally escapes \, \r, \n, the U+2028/U+2029 line/paragraph separators that break JavaScript string literals, and unicode-escapes < > & to keep injected article HTML from terminating the surrounding <script>.
